title: Characterizing Schedules Based on Serializability
description: A decision flowchart to classify database schedules as serializable or non-serializable, including conflict and view serializable types.
relationships: Start with a Schedule -> Check if it is Conflict Equivalent to a Serial Schedule? (Yes path leads to Conflict Serializable, No path leads to next check) -> Check if it is View Equivalent to a Serial Schedule? (Yes path leads to View Serializable, No path leads to Non-Serializable)
